segments.text: Up smash there! Weak mashing out!
segments.original_text: 上スマッシュ見えたか弱暴れ

segments.text: So Purple's down smash was a bit off
segments.original_text: さあ紫での下スマッシュはちょっと外だったので

segments.text: Speaking of shield breaks, that down smash from Purple was the shield break right there!
segments.original_text: シールドブレイク上目といえば下スマは紫でのシールドブレイクです

full_text: Up smash there! Weak mashing out! So Purple's down smash was a bit off Speaking of shield breaks, that down smash from Purple was the shield break right there!
